channel.title: reactive audio on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist
channel.description: Recent content in reactive audio on Jean-Christophe Ploquin & Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist

item.title: Fluctus Planetarium: Everything About the Imminent Stable Release
item.description: 🎵 Fluctus Planetarium: The Stable Version Is Coming! Final game icon Current Project Status Fluctus Planetarium is entering its final development phase with a stable version scheduled for September 2025. We are therefore in the critical period where this new version should see the light very soon. Final Steps Before Release Technical Finalization Event cards balancing: Completed last week Rules proofreading: In progress, version 1.14.18 Printed prototypes: Finalized, “blind play” tests were conducted in August Testing Phase The game adaptation has entered the polishing phase, a crucial step that determines the final quality of the user experience.
